name: webdev
description: Monorepo for web development MCP tools

scripts.build: npm run build -w @winstonfassett/webdev-gateway && npm run build -w @winstonfassett/webdev-vite && npm run build -w @winstonfassett/webdev-astro && npm run build -w @winstonfassett/webdev-next
scripts.prepublish:check: npm run build && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/webdev-gateway && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/webdev-vite && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/webdev-astro && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/webdev-next
scripts.publish:all: npm publish -w @winstonfassett/webdev-gateway && npm publish -w @winstonfassett/webdev-vite && npm publish -w @winstonfassett/webdev-astro && npm publish -w @winstonfassett/webdev-next
scripts.gateway:build: npm run build && npm --prefix apps/admin-svelte run build
scripts.gateway:start: nohup node packages/gateway/dist/cli.js > /tmp/webdev-gateway.log 2>&1 & disown; sleep 1; echo 'started (logs: /tmp/webdev-gateway.log)'
scripts.gateway:restart: npm run gateway:build && npm run gateway:stop && npm run gateway:start
